site.name: Akasha Production
site.tagline: Concept, web design and project ecosystem
site.meta_description: Akasha Production designs web creations, showcases its projects and supports professional websites.

home.title: Flexible universes built on solid foundations
home.lead: Akasha Production designs its web universes with a focus on seamless user experience, for both visitors and administrators. We offer fully customizable solutions and personalized support.
home.stat1_text: We have been developing and maintaining web projects online since 2005.
home.stat2_text: We stay on top of technological advances to optimize our solutions.
home.stat3_text: Original creations and themed domains as live demonstrations.
home.scene_top_meta: Presentation, services, ordering and support in a single platform.
home.scene_bottom_meta: Web design, hosting, domain, client area and ticketing.
home.who_title: We build our own web universes and support your professional and personal projects.
home.who_p1: Akasha Production designs, develops and evolves its own web creations. This hands-on practice compels us to think through usability, editorial structure, commercial consistency and long-term technical sustainability.
home.who_p2: Professional projects demand a tangible level of excellence. Enriched by the shared experiences of numerous collaborations, we have refined our methods to bring ever greater precision to our tools. The goal is always the same: a serious, clear, lasting and truly functional web presence.
home.card1_title: A parent company for multiple universes
home.card1_text: Each sub-project keeps its own personality while remaining connected to a clear architecture of domains, content and offers.
home.card2_text: Our system lets you combine web design, hosting and domain into promotional packs.
home.card3_text: From your initial inquiry to our technical ticket system, we are here to answer your questions.
home.card4_text: Our own projects serve as a permanent laboratory, and professional projects demand a tangible level of excellence.
home.projects_note: Explore the different web universes developed by Akasha Production, live demonstration!

solutions.title: Defined & adaptable offers
solutions.lead: Each service can be ordered individually or combined with different options. Discover our offers, and click on a product to pre-select it in the order configurator.
solutions.creation_note: Choose the design level that matches your project.
solutions.hosting_note: Choose the server environment suited to your traffic and needs.
solutions.domain_p1: Each order includes a free subdomain on our parent domains (your-choice.akashaproduction.com, etc.), subject to relevance to your project.
solutions.domain_p2: You can also add a custom domain name. The price varies depending on the chosen extension and availability is checked in real time in the order configurator.
solutions.payment_text: For fixed-price orders, you can split the total amount into 3 payments spread 4 months apart, with no additional fees. This option can be selected at checkout.

contact.title: Describe your needs, constraints and share your documents.
contact.lead: The contact form records all sender information, supports a detailed project mode and accepts DOCX, PDF, JPG and WEBP formats.
contact.processing_text: This form is the main entry point for commercial, technical and document transmission requests.
contact.processing_detail: Describe your needs here, attach your files, and your request will be recorded with confirmation on the page.
contact.has_project: This is a project that needs scoping
contact.flash_warning: Please provide at least your first name, last name, email and message.
contact.flash_success: Your message has been successfully recorded. A confirmation is displayed on this page and your request has been forwarded.

commander.title: Build your custom offer.
commander.lead: Combine web design, hosting and domain name. Promotions are automatically applied to eligible combinations.
commander.subdomain_text: A free subdomain is offered on our parent domains, subject to relevance to your project.
commander.domain_add: Add a dedicated domain name (price varies by extension)
commander.quote_text: Fill in this information to enable a tailored estimate for your needs.
commander.summary_note: Combined prices automatically benefit from pack pricing. Secure payment via Stripe with detailed invoice.
commander.flash_warning: Please provide your essential information and the project description.
commander.flash_quote_success: Your quote request has been successfully recorded. We will get back to you with a tailored proposal.

account.title: Access your orders and support.
account.lead: Enter the name and email used during your order to access your client file, review your requests and open a ticket if needed.
account.orders_card_text: View registered services, selected options and the details of your request.
account.commercial_card_text: Open a ticket for a quote, an order question, a payment or a domain.
account.technical_card_text: Report an incident, an access issue, DNS, email or performance problem.
account.access_text: This form allows you to retrieve your client area using the information already provided in your order.
account.no_orders_text: No orders are currently associated with this email. Please verify the address used during the request or contact us if needed.
account.subject: Subject
account.flash_ticket_success: Your ticket has been successfully created.
account.flash_ticket_warning: Please provide your name, email, subject and message.

confirmation.title: Thank you for your order.
confirmation.lead: Your payment has been successfully processed. You will receive a detailed invoice by email.
confirmation.next_text: We are preparing your project. A confirmation email with your invoice will be sent shortly. For any questions, visit your
confirmation.not_found: Order not found or already processed. Check your

legal.title: Website legal information
legal.data_p1: Information submitted through the contact, order and support forms is recorded to process the request and manage the client relationship.
legal.data_p2: The client may request the deletion or correction of their data using the contact page.

vitrine.label: Showcase pack
vitrine.headline: Showcase design + shared yearly hosting
vitrine.description: The most straightforward pack to launch a complete professional presence.

complexe.label: Complex pack
complexe.headline: Complex design + shared yearly hosting
complexe.description: For projects that require more pages, more modules and a database.

custom.label: Custom pack
custom.headline: Custom design + hosting, quote-based
custom.description: Full assessment and tailored pricing for unique requirements.
